cli-description: You can also publish builds directly from the terminal with rmhcode.
manage-subtitle: Manage your published and draft builds
no-builds-description: Create your first build and share it with the community.
share-project-with-community: Share your project with the community. You can save as a draft and publish later.
sign-in-to-manage: You need to sign in to manage your builds.
sign-in-to-submit: You need to sign in to submit a build.
